title: The Shillong (Rifle Range and Umlong) Cantonments Assimilation of Laws Act, 1954
full_text: The Shillong (Rifle Range and Umlong) Cantonments Assimilation of Laws Act, 1954 शिलांग (राइफल रेंज और उमलांग) छावनी विधियों की एकरूपता अधिनियम,1954 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195431 Act Number: 31 Enactment Date: 1954-05-28 Act Year: 1954 Short Title: The Shillong (Rifle Range and Umlong) Cantonments Assimilation of Laws Act, 1954 Hindi Title: शिलांग (राइफल रेंज और उमलांग) छावनी विधियों की एकरूपता अधिनियम,1954 Long Title: An Act to assimilate certain laws in force in the scheduled areas to the laws in force in the Khasi and Jaintia Hills District. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Defence Enforcement Date: 16-08-1954 Notification: 16th August, 1954, vide notification No. S.R.O. 2674, dated 11th April, 1954, see Gazette of India, 1954, Part II, s. 3. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Shillong (Rifle Range and Umlong) Cantonments Assimilation of Laws Act, 1954 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Assimilation of laws. Section 4. Removal of difficulties. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
